creator: doc@lublin.t1.pl
text:
Submitter-Id:	current-users
 Originator:	Michal Pasternak
 Confidential:	no <FreeBSD PRs are public data>
 Synopsis:	New port: misc/gnugadu 
 Severity:	non-critical
 Priority:	low
 Category:	ports
 Class:		update
 Release:	FreeBSD 4.4-STABLE i386
 Environment:
 System: FreeBSD pr93.lublin.sdi.tpnet.pl 4.4-STABLE FreeBSD 4.4-STABLE #14: Mon Nov 26 05:27:32 CET 2001 doc@pr93.lublin.sdi.tpnet.pl:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/DOCUS i386
 
 
 Description:
 
 	GaduGadu is an ICQ-like messenger in Poland.
 	GNUGadu allows to send messages to GaduGadu.
 
 Fix:
 # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
 # this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
 # create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
 # have default permissions.
 #
 # This archive contains:
 #
 #	gnugadu
 #	gnugadu/pkg-plist
 #	gnugadu/pkg-descr
 #	gnugadu/pkg-comment
 #	gnugadu/distinfo
 #	gnugadu/Makefile
 #	gnugadu/files
 #	gnugadu/files/patch-aa
 #
 echo c - gnugadu
 mkdir -p gnugadu > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - gnugadu/pkg-plist
 sed 's/^X//' >gnugadu/pkg-plist << 'END-of-gnugadu/pkg-plist'
 Xbin/gg
 Xshare/gnome/apps/Internet/GnuGadu.desktop
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/arrow.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/away.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/cellphone.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/chat.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/config.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/gg.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/ignored.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/invisible.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/malehead.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/msg.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/offline.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/online.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/online_connecting.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/online_main.xpm
 Xshare/gg/pixmaps/search.xpm
 Xshare/gg/sounds/msg.wav
 Xshare/gg/sounds/usr.wav
 Xshare/gg/sounds/yahoo.wav
 X@dirrm share/gg/sounds
 X@dirrm share/gg/pixmaps
 X@dirrm share/gg
 END-of-gnugadu/pkg-plist
 echo x - gnugadu/pkg-descr
 sed 's/^X//' >gnugadu/pkg-descr << 'END-of-gnugadu/pkg-descr'
 XGaduGadu client for X11/GTK
 XWWW: http://netkrab.slackware.pl/gg/
 END-of-gnugadu/pkg-descr
 echo x - gnugadu/pkg-comment
 sed 's/^X//' >gnugadu/pkg-comment << 'END-of-gnugadu/pkg-comment'
 XGnuGadu client, a GaduGadu client for X11/GTK
 END-of-gnugadu/pkg-comment
 echo x - gnugadu/distinfo
 sed 's/^X//' >gnugadu/distinfo << 'END-of-gnugadu/distinfo'
 XMD5 (gg-0.2.0.tar.gz) = 2a1966433f83c16f950c0c07b108dbb1
 END-of-gnugadu/distinfo
 echo x - gnugadu/Makefile
 sed 's/^X//' >gnugadu/Makefile << 'END-of-gnugadu/Makefile'
 X# Ports collection makefile for: gnugadu
 X# Date created:		23 dec 2001
 X# Whom: 		doc@lublin.t1.pl
 X#
 X# $FreeBSD$
 X#
 X
 XPORTNAME=      gnugadu
 XPORTVERSION=   0.2.0
 XCATEGORIES=    misc
 XMASTER_SITES=  ftp://ftp.slackware.pl/gg/
 XDISTNAME=      gg-${PORTVERSION}
 X
 XMAINTAINER=    doc@lublin.t1.pl
 X
 XWRKSRC=	${WRKDIR}/gg-${PORTVERSION}
 X
 XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
 XUSE_GTK=	yes
 X.if defined(HAVE_ESOUND)
 XUSE_ESOUND=	yes
 X.else
 XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--disable-esd
 X.endif
 XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 X
 Xpost-install:
 X	     strip ${PREFIX}/bin/gg
 X
 X.include <bsd.port.mk>
 END-of-gnugadu/Makefile
 echo c - gnugadu/files
 mkdir -p gnugadu/files > /dev/null 2>&1
 echo x - gnugadu/files/patch-aa
 sed 's/^X//' >gnugadu/files/patch-aa << 'END-of-gnugadu/files/patch-aa'
 X--- orig.configure	Mon Dec  3 14:42:35 2001
 X+++ configure	Sun Dec 23 21:21:31 2001
 X@@ -2412,13 +2412,13 @@
 X   if test x$glib_config_exec_prefix != x ; then
 X      glib_config_args="$glib_config_args --exec-prefix=$glib_config_exec_prefix"
 X      if test x${GLIB_CONFIG+set} != xset ; then
 X-        GLIB_CONFIG=$glib_config_exec_prefix/bin/glib-config
 X+        GLIB_CONFIG=$glib_config_exec_prefix/bin/glib12-config
 X      fi
 X   fi
 X   if test x$glib_config_prefix != x ; then
 X      glib_config_args="$glib_config_args --prefix=$glib_config_prefix"
 X      if test x${GLIB_CONFIG+set} != xset ; then
 X-        GLIB_CONFIG=$glib_config_prefix/bin/glib-config
 X+        GLIB_CONFIG=$glib_config_prefix/bin/glib12-config
 X      fi
 X   fi
 X 
 X--- src/orig.main.c	Tue Dec  4 00:09:20 2001
 X+++ src/main.c	Sun Dec 23 21:21:59 2001
 X@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@
 X #include <sys/stat.h>
 X #include <string.h>
 X #include <signal.h>
 X-#include <wait.h>
 X+// #include <wait.h>
 X 
 X #include "gg-types.h"
 X #include "gg.h"
 X--- src/orig.net.c	Mon Dec  3 10:29:15 2001
 X+++ src/net.c	Sun Dec 23 21:22:29 2001
 X@@ -5,6 +5,8 @@
 X #include <glib.h>
 X #include <gdk/gdk.h>
 X 
 X+#include <sys/types.h>
 X+
 X #include <sys/socket.h>
 X #include <netinet/in.h>
 X #include <arpa/inet.h>
 END-of-gnugadu/files/patch-aa
 exit
